title: pilosella brachiata subsp. sabranskyi
intro: Pilosella brachiata subsp. sabranskyi is a subspecies of the Pilosella brachiata plant, also known as a type of perennial dandelion, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella brachiata subsp. sabranskyi include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with its herbal preparations often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of certain gastrointestinal disorders.
